item.title: 送餐应用 | Food Delivery App
item.description:
沃伊泰克·克日维茨

发表于这是一个非常简单的送餐应用程序。 它允许搜索食物，然后订购并将其运送到您的家中。

这背后的想法是构建一个事件驱动的分布式系统。 它包含 5 个微服务，它们通过事件（大部分时间）相互通信。

除此之外，我想尝试实现一个简单的事件溯源系统，其中所有业务事件都存储为一系列状态更改事件。

在这个项目中，所有这些概念都包含在 Redis 中。

但这还不是全部！ 它还使用其他 Redis 模块，例如 RedisJSON 和 Redis Search 来展示使用 Redis 构建可靠系统是多么容易。

提交类别：微服务专家

该项目的视频解释器

使用的语言

链接到代码

这是一个非常简单的送餐分布式系统。 它允许搜索食物，然后通过送货订购。

整个系统由 5 个微服务组成（1 个 React，4 个 Java/Spring）：

  • 交付- 管理交付的核心服务。

概述视频（可选）

这是一个简短的视频，解释了该项目以及它如何使用 Redis：

这个怎么运作

以下是使用 Redis 模块的系统架构概述：

大多数通信是基于命令和事件......

其他资源/信息

一旦暂停，wkrzywiec 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，wkrzywiec 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，wkrzywiec 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 wkrzywiec 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 wkrzywiec 的方法：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 wkrzywiec 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Wojtek Krzywiec

Posted on Aug 28

This is a very simple food delivery app. It allows to search for food and then order and delivery it to your home.

The idea behind this was to build an event-driven distributed system. It contains 5 microservices which communicates with each other via events (most of the time).

Apart from that I wanted to try to implement a simple event sourcing system in which all business events are stored as a sequence of state-changing events.

In this project all these concepts are covered with Redis.

But this is not everything! It also uses other Redis modules, e.g. RedisJSON and Redis Search to show how easy it's to build a reliable system with Redis.

Submission Category: Microservice Mavens

Video Explainer of this project

Language Used

Link to Code

This is a very simple food delivery distributed system. It allows to search for food and then order them with a delivery.

The entire system is made of 5 microservices (1 React, 4 Java/Spring):

  • ui - React application, used by customers to place orders, manage them and track deliveries, url: http://localhost:80,
  • bff - backend for frontend service, used to provide REST endpoint for ui, url: http://localhost:8081/swagger-ui.html,
  • food - service that handles adding available meals to Redis, url: http://localhost:8084/swagger-ui.html,
  • ordering - core service for managing orders,
  • delivery - core service for managing deliveries.

Overview video (Optional)

Here's a short video that explains the project and how it uses Redis:

[Insert your own video here, and remove the one below]

How it works

Here is the overview of a system architecture with used Redis modules:

Most of the communication is based on commands and events…

Additional Resources / Info

Once suspended, wkrzywiec will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, wkrzywiec will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by wkrzywiec will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If wkrzywiec is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Thanks for keeping DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻 safe. Here is what you can do to flag wkrzywiec:

wkrzywiec consistently posts content that violates DEV Community 👩‍💻👨‍💻's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging wkrzywiec will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: wkrzywiec
